---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability or enhancement for FinanceOS
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What's missing or painful right now? Describe the gap, not the solution yet.

## Proposed Solution

What you'd like to see built. Be specific about which module(s) this touches (`Database`, `FinanceEngine`, `API`, `Analytics`, `Automation`, `Gateway`, `Menu`, or frontend).

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you didn't propose them instead.

## Schema Impact

- [ ] No changes to sheet columns required
- [ ] Requires new columns (additive, non-breaking)
- [ ] Requires renaming/removing existing columns (breaking, requires MAJOR version bump per [Versioning Strategy](../../docs/VERSIONING.md))

## Roadmap Check

Confirm you've checked [docs/ROADMAP.md](../../docs/ROADMAP.md) and this isn't already listed under **Explicitly Out of Scope**.

- [ ] Checked, this isn't out of scope

## Additional Context

Mockups, links, or related issues.
